messages.content: Let’s play a game together. I will think of a fictional character. You will ask me 20 questions. After you ask me the 20 questions, you will guess who the character is. Let’s go!

Sounds fun! I'll start with some general questions to narrow it down.

1. Is your character from a book?
no
2. Is your character from a movie?
no
3. Is your character from a TV series?
no
4. Is your character from a video game?
yes
5. Is your character human?
no
6. Is your character from a game released after 2010?
yes
7. Does your character have special powers or abilities?
yes
8. Is your character from a role-playing game (RPG)?
yes
9. Is your character from a game developed in Japan?
no
10. Is your character the main protagonist in their game?
no
11. Is your character from a fantasy-themed game?
yes
12. Is your character an animal or an animal-like creature?
no
13. Is your character part of a game series?
unsure
14. Can your character be considered villainous or antagonistic?
no
15. Does your character have a distinctive color?
yes
16. Is your character associated with a specific element (like fire, water, wind, earth)?
no
17. Does your character use a weapon?
no
18. Is your character known for a specific ability or talent besides fighting or combat?
